name: amazon sellers processing 10–20 shipments/month tool
description: For amazon sellers processing 10–20 shipments/month, high shipping costs cause cash flow gaps. We automate shipping data aggregation and cost calculation instead of manual tracking and reporting of shipping data.
problem_solved: High shipping costs and lack of detailed logistics reporting.

locked_fields.primary_problem: High shipping costs and lack of detailed logistics reporting.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking and reporting of shipping data

one_liner: For amazon sellers processing 10–20 shipments/month, high shipping costs cause cash flow gaps. We automate shipping data aggregation and cost calculation instead of manual tracking and reporting of shipping data.
